---
description: "Investigate and fix a bug in the oddjobs.design typography tool"
agent: "agent"
argument-hint: "Describe the bug or unexpected behavior..."
---
Investigate and fix the following bug in the oddjobs.design typography animation tool:

$input

## Steps

1. Read the relevant source files to understand the current implementation
2. Reproduce or reason about the bug based on the description
3. Identify the root cause
4. Implement the fix with minimal changes — don't refactor unrelated code
5. Verify there are no errors in the changed files
6. Append a new session entry to `PROMPT-HISTORY.md` using the template at the top of that file
